name: ember-3-legacy
description: EmberJS 3.x (Feb 2018 – 3.28 LTS Aug 2021) — the era where Octane was introduced (3.15 made it default), classic and Octane patterns coexist, jQuery is removed, and the test API was modernized. Use when working in mid-migration codebases, when adopting Octane within a 3.x app, or when planning a 3.28 → 4.x upgrade. Includes a 3.28 → 4.12 migration skill.
